description: Select a composite type column mapped to a generated Rust struct

rust-sqlx.model_struct:
#[derive(Debug, Clone, sqlx::Type)]
#[sqlx(type_name = "address")]
pub struct Address {
    pub street: String,
    pub city: String,
    pub zip: String,
}

name: composite_column
schema_sql: CREATE TYPE address AS (street TEXT, city TEXT, zip TEXT);
CREATE TABLE contacts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, home_address address NOT NULL);
